creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
Hi,

the MAX for BASE MEMORY in VirtualBox is set to 0MB, its not possible to change any options because of this.

Here is the screenshot of the problem:
http://i.imgur.com/YhBelYg.png

My installed packages below.

Regards,
vermaden
